requirements.summary: Audit and remove all Google API references from frontend search hook and SearchInterface component
acceptanceCriteria: No Google API URLs or OAuth references exist in frontend source files
Search results render correctly from DuckDuckGo responses
No access-denied error messages appear in the search UI

file_operations.description: Audit the useSearch hook to remove any remaining Google API URLs, OAuth tokens, or Google-specific query parameters. Ensure all search requests use only the backend actor's search method, which routes exclusively to DuckDuckGo. Verify error handling does not reference Google services.

Review and remove any hardcoded Google API endpoints, API keys, or OAuth flows from the SearchInterface component. Ensure the component only calls useSearch hook and displays DuckDuckGo results. Verify no Google domain references exist in error messages or fallback UI.
